input.command: git -C "/testbed" diff --check && git -C "/testbed" diff -- include/po/parser.h lib/po/argument_parser.cpp test/po/po.cpp && git -C "/testbed" status --short
input.description: Validate diff formatting and show final changes

content.text:
Implemented the fix without committing changes.

Summary of changes:
- `include/po/parser.h`
  - Numeric parsers now reject trailing garbage by requiring the conversion end pointer to reach `'\0'`.
  - Integer parse errors now report messages like:
    - `invalid integer value: 100abc`
    - `integer value out of range: ...`
  - Floating-point parse errors now report messages like:
    - `invalid floating-point value: ...`
    - `floating-point value out of range: ...`

- `lib/po/argument_parser.cpp`
  - Propagates `consume_argument` errors for space-separated option values, e.g. `--time-limit 100abc`.
  - Propagates `consume_argument` errors for equals-form option values, e.g. `--time-limit=100abc`.
  - Fixed cosmetic message spacing:
    - from `option foodoesn't need arguments.`
    - to `option foo doesn't need arguments.`

Validation performed:
- Added temporary PO regression cases for both `--b=2abc` and `--b 2abcx`.
- Confirmed they failed before/while fixing and passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary regression test changes as requested.
- Ran final PO test suite successfully:

```text
ctest --test-dir "/testbed/build" -R '^poTests$' --output-on-failure
100% tests passed, 0 tests failed out of 1
```

Remaining modified files:
- `include/po/parser.h`
- `lib/po/argument_parser.cpp`

No commits were made.

result:
Implemented the fix without committing changes.

Summary of changes:
- `include/po/parser.h`
  - Numeric parsers now reject trailing garbage by requiring the conversion end pointer to reach `'\0'`.
  - Integer parse errors now report messages like:
    - `invalid integer value: 100abc`
    - `integer value out of range: ...`
  - Floating-point parse errors now report messages like:
    - `invalid floating-point value: ...`
    - `floating-point value out of range: ...`

- `lib/po/argument_parser.cpp`
  - Propagates `consume_argument` errors for space-separated option values, e.g. `--time-limit 100abc`.
  - Propagates `consume_argument` errors for equals-form option values, e.g. `--time-limit=100abc`.
  - Fixed cosmetic message spacing:
    - from `option foodoesn't need arguments.`
    - to `option foo doesn't need arguments.`

Validation performed:
- Added temporary PO regression cases for both `--b=2abc` and `--b 2abcx`.
- Confirmed they failed before/while fixing and passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary regression test changes as requested.
- Ran final PO test suite successfully:

```text
ctest --test-dir "/testbed/build" -R '^poTests$' --output-on-failure
100% tests passed, 0 tests failed out of 1
```

Remaining modified files:
